subject: Eco-Friendly Cleaning for Imperial Dragon Property Management
body:
Hi Sarah,

We understand that managing properties across the UK comes with its unique challenges, and maintaining pristine, healthy environments for residents and tenants is always a top priority.

Many property managers face challenges with unreliable cleaning contractors, inconsistent standards, and the use of harsh chemicals in shared residential spaces. At Neo Eco Cleaning, we solve all three:

• 100% eco-friendly cleaning products - no toxic chemicals in shared spaces

• Ex-Hilton Hotel trained staff - hospitality-grade cleaning standards

• Quality Guarantee - all complaints resolved at no additional cost

• Trusted by Rendall & Rittner (Property Manager of the Year 2024), MVN Block Management and many estate agents.

Based on your portfolio, we think these services could be particularly relevant:

Block & Communal Cleaning - weekly scheduled cleans from £150/month, includes stairwells, lobbies, and bin rooms.

End of Tenancy Cleaning - from £180/property, 24-hour turnaround, meets letting agent standards

Commercial Office Cleaning - from £200/month, includes daily, 3x weekly, or weekly cleaning schedules.

Residential Deep Clean - from £150/session, a one-off deep clean or regular weekly/bi-weekly cleans.

Window Cleaning Service - from £100/session, for internal, external, or both.

We work with property managers and building management companies across North London, and we'd love to explore if we could help maintain the highest standards across your portfolio.

Would a free, no-obligation site survey work this week? We can assess your requirements and provide a tailored quote - completely free.

subject: Elevating Cleaning Standards in North London
body:
Hi pratik,

We are at Neo Eco Cleaning, and we understand the importance of maintaining pristine environments, especially in professional settings like yours, even without specific details about your company's properties.

Many property managers face challenges with unreliable cleaning contractors, inconsistent standards, and the use of harsh chemicals in shared residential spaces. At Neo Eco Cleaning, we solve all three:

• 100% eco-friendly cleaning products - no toxic chemicals in shared spaces

• Ex-Hilton Hotel trained staff - hospitality-grade cleaning standards

• Quality Guarantee - all complaints resolved at no additional cost

• Trusted by Rendall & Rittner (Property Manager of the Year 2024), MVN Block Management and many estate agents.

Based on your portfolio, we think these services could be particularly relevant:

Commercial Office Cleaning - daily, 3x weekly, or weekly cleaning from £200/month, using non-toxic and biodegradable products.

Residential Deep Clean - one-off deep clean or regular weekly/bi-weekly service from £150/session, using 100% natural and allergy-friendly products.

Window Cleaning Service - internal, external, or both from £100/session, utilising purified water systems and eco-friendly glass cleaners.

Pressure Washing Service - driveway, car park, or building exterior cleaning from £250/session, with water-efficient systems and eco-friendly solutions.

We work with property managers and building management companies across North London, and we'd love to explore if we could help maintain the highest standards across your portfolio.

Would a free, no-obligation site survey work this week? We can assess your requirements and provide a tailored quote - completely free.
